items.caption: The cover of an audiobook titled "the sound of your voice" by simon & schuster audio. the cover features a split image of two faces, one male and one female, with the male face on the left and the female face on the right. the male face is in profile, and the female face is in a three-quarter view. the background is a gradient of brown tones, and the text is in white and black. the title is prominently displayed in large, bold letters at the top of the cover, and the author's name is at the bottom. the overall style of the image is simple and straightforward, focusing on the title and the faces to convey the theme of communication and voice.
